episodes.title: HOT TAKES! - Donald Trump Wants To Distract You From The Epstein Files!
episodes.description:
Don dives into the explosive reporting surrounding the files connected to Jeffrey Epstein, and troubling claims that records tied to an alleged victim’s accusation against Donald Trump are missing.
As questions mount, so does public frustration. Will the full Epstein files ever be released? And will there ever be meaningful accountability for the powerful figures whose names have surfaced over the years?
